definitions.text: To designate a date earlier than the actual one; to move a date, appointment, event, or period of time to an earlier point (contrast "postdate".)
To exist or to occur before something else; to antedate.
examples: The Chinese use of Pascal's Triangle predates its discovery by Blaise Pascal.

definitions.text: A publication, such as a newspaper or magazine, that is issued with a printed date later than the date of issue.
